scripts.test:e2e:ticketing:spec: node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test e2e/navigation.spec.ts --project=chromium --grep "paid venue" --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:virtual-patch: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('test-results/virtual-patch-chromium',{recursive:true,force:true});" && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test e2e/virtual-patch.spec.ts e2e/virtual-patch-visual-demo.spec.ts --project=chromium --output=test-results/virtual-patch-chromium --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:virtual-patch:mobile: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('test-results/virtual-patch-mobile',{recursive:true,force:true});" && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test e2e/virtual-patch.spec.ts e2e/virtual-patch-visual-demo.spec.ts --project=mobile-safari --output=test-results/virtual-patch-mobile --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:virtual-patch:all: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('test-results/virtual-patch-chromium',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.rmSync('test-results/virtual-patch-mobile',{recursive:true,force:true});" && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test e2e/virtual-patch.spec.ts e2e/virtual-patch-visual-demo.spec.ts --project=chromium --output=test-results/virtual-patch-chromium --reporter=line && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test e2e/virtual-patch.spec.ts e2e/virtual-patch-visual-demo.spec.ts --project=mobile-safari --output=test-results/virtual-patch-mobile --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:perks-gating: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('test-results/perks-gating-chromium',{recursive:true,force:true});" && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && node ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test e2e/perks-gating.spec.ts --project=chromium --output=test-results/perks-gating-chromium --reporter=line
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:run: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
